title: REAL easy mode
description: A Mod that can easify your game.
body:
# **What's Changes?**
## **1.Coal To Diamondрџ¤‘рџ¤‘рџ¤‘**
According to the literature, diamond = coal. So you can place lava around the coal ore. Then right-click on the coal ore. Finally, the coal ore will turn into diamond ore!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28e6148671f597c9636c45bdf86982ac68e1090c.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c177c48b86ce352627e5569d51cf73f88ef9bc4.png)
## **2.New Items**
### **1.Enhanced Eye of Enderрџ‘ЃпёЏрџ‘ЃпёЏрџ‘ЃпёЏ**
Place an End Portal at your feet.
### **2.Eye of Netherрџ‘ЃпёЏрџ‘ЃпёЏрџ‘ЃпёЏ**
Place an Nether Portal at your feet.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f6f5be73898cadb59e83565ae8af0ee617ec797.png)
### **3.Home StoneрџЏ рџЏ рџЏ **
Save a home point at your coordinates. You can use a command to teleport to this home point (see below for specific usage).
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1d4a7427ee9a3b9227d8f955b511c4d96f87ae.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9aaff7e43cdaa12341d713896d232b06a21b85a.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0d1ebfb331de85b77f2c16b37f5ed9d9c29c41.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/153f0eb2db2aa9d48b80717d3fd9cb4cf99ed8cc.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9888f88064437bfad1905c7504d859ede67616f6.png)
You can also delete your home point.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7689396cefafe7cb48ae51669fac3e70ab2af1.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34009e7a87dba8f7085dd4d393879960da9a8591.png)
## **3.Totem Of Undyingрџ’Ђрџ’Ђрџ’Ђ**
When you are not holding the Totem of Undying, the Totem of Undying will still save your life but will not give you any effects.
## **4.Survival KitрџЏњпёЏрџЏњпёЏрџЏњпёЏ**
When you spawn on the beach, the mod will give you some resources.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42dbf192a94b396cefa4940738a39e9626f97997.png)
